text: Operators flagged a short window of unusual readings on T-014 over the last few days. Run an anomaly check on its sensor stream and cross-reference the recent trend so it can be determined whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.
characteristic_form: The answer should report the anomaly findings for T-014, summarize the recent trend direction, and conclude whether the disturbance is an isolated short burst or part of a sustained drift in the underlying signal.
